steps.title: Apply the substitution from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $x+6 = 46$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. It's given that $x=40$. Adding $6$ to both sides of this equation yields $x+6=40+6$, or $x+6=46$. Therefore, the value of $x+6$ is $46$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $x-6$, not $x+6$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $x$, not $x+6$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $x+24$, not $x+6$.
